scores.notes: Text accuracy suffers from several misspellings (e.g., 'Z0zs', 'Weod sid & Zoad', 'Lalifornia', 'Iac', 'Letrti Landing', 'Lal; fornic', 'Gorezaw Tkroughwal', 'Mercl', 'Merck'). Numeric precision is impacted by the date 'Z0zs -0s-11' and 'Z0zs' for years, and 'Mercl'/'Merck' for months. The '93& &' for square feet is also an issue. Table structure and layout are generally well-preserved, and most text is captured, though some minor characters like the 'Mc Mel day' at the bottom seem out of place or incomplete.
